headline: AppLovin to Participate in the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference
summary: PALO ALTO, Calif., March 03, 2026--AppLovin Corporation, (NASDAQ: APP) ("AppLovin" or the "Company") the leading marketing platform, today announced that it will participate in a fireside chat at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference in San Francisco, CA on Wednesday, March 4 at 8:30am PT.
